title: Module Manifest
description: Manifest for a Legalise workspace module. Every module ships one of these at the root of its backend directory.

name.description: Kebab-case public identifier. Used in routes, navigation, and discovery.

version.description: Semantic version of the module itself, independent of Legalise core.

description.description: One sentence on what this module does for a matter.

license.description: SPDX identifier. Apache-2.0 recommended for upstream contributions.

label.description: Text shown in the matter sidebar.

icon.description: Optional icon reference (lucide:icon-name or a custom URL).

order.description: Sort order in the navigation. 10-50 reserved for built-in tabs. Third-party defaults to 60+.

backend_prefix.description: Path prefix for the module's FastAPI router.

frontend_route.description: TanStack Router route pattern. Use $slug for the matter slug placeholder.

items.description: Plugin slug from the claude-for-uk-legal marketplace (e.g. 'uk-litigation-legal:pre-motion').
Required MCP server. Module fails to load if not configured.

core_version.description: SemVer range of Legalise core this module is compatible with. Defaults to caret of current minor.

permissions.description: Permissions the module requires. Audit and model-call permissions are granted by default to all modules; explicit declaration is preferred.

capabilities.description: Declared capabilities the module exercises. v0.1 surfaces these as declarations under review; runtime per-capability enforcement is v0.2.

trust_posture.description: Trust band for the module. Surfaced in the Modules page; declarative only in v0.1.
